'''âth-t-f-sh''' ('''kathatfeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chalan|chalan]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-t-f-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chalan|chalan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-t-f-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kathatfeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithatfeshoko|thithatfeshoko]] || [[word:jithatfeshoko|jithatfeshoko]] || [[word:shithatfeshoko|shithatfeshoko]] || [[word:kithatfeshoko|kithatfeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthatfeshoko|thuthuthatfeshoko]] || [[word:jujuthatfeshoko|jujuthatfeshoko]] || [[word:shushuthatfeshoko|shushuthatfeshoko]] || [[word:kukuthatfeshoko|kukuthatfeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthatfeshoko|thuthatfeshoko]] || [[word:juthatfeshoko|juthatfeshoko]] || [[word:shuthatfeshoko|shuthatfeshoko]] || [[word:kuthatfeshoko|kuthatfeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthatfeshoko|thuthatfeshoko]] || [[word:juthatfeshoko|juthatfeshoko]] || [[word:shuthatfeshoko|shuthatfeshoko]] || [[word:kuthatfeshoko|kuthatfeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethatfeshoko|thethatfeshoko]] || [[word:jethatfeshoko|jethatfeshoko]] || [[word:shethatfeshoko|shethatfeshoko]] || [[word:kethatfeshoko|kethatfeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothatfeshoko|thothothatfeshoko]] || [[word:jojothatfeshoko|jojothatfeshoko]] || [[word:shoshothatfeshoko|shoshothatfeshoko]] || [[word:kokothatfeshoko|kokothatfeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothatfeshoko|thothatfeshoko]] || [[word:jothatfeshoko|jothatfeshoko]] || [[word:shothatfeshoko|shothatfeshoko]] || [[word:kothatfeshoko|kothatfeshoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothatfeshoko|thothatfeshoko]] || [[word:jothatfeshoko|jothatfeshoko]] || [[word:shothatfeshoko|shothatfeshoko]] || [[word:kothatfeshoko|kothatfeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthatfeshoko|thĂŠthatfeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠthatfeshoko|jĂŠthatfeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠthatfeshoko|shĂŠthatfeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠthatfeshoko|kĂŠthatfeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathatfeshoko|thathathatfeshoko]] || [[word:jajathatfeshoko|jajathatfeshoko]] || [[word:shashathatfeshoko|shashathatfeshoko]] || [[word:kakathatfeshoko|kakathatfeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathatfeshoko|thathatfeshoko]] || [[word:jathatfeshoko|jathatfeshoko]] || [[word:shathatfeshoko|shathatfeshoko]] || [[word:kathatfeshoko|kathatfeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathatfeshoko|thathatfeshoko]] || [[word:jathatfeshoko|jathatfeshoko]] || [[word:shathatfeshoko|shathatfeshoko]] || [[word:kathatfeshoko|kathatfeshoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shathatfeshithi|shathatfeshithi]] || [[word:shathatfeshiji|shathatfeshiji]] || [[word:shathatfeshishi|shathatfeshishi]] || [[word:shathatfeshiki|shathatfeshiki]]
